nasb.text: There is one who scatters, and yet increases all the more, And there is one who withholds what is justly due, and yet it results only in want.

esv.text: One gives freely, yet grows all the richer; another withholds what he should give, and only suffers want.

cnv.text: 有人慷慨好施，財富卻更增添； 有人吝嗇過度，反招致貧窮。

ccb.text: 有人乐善好施，反倒越来越富； 有人一毛不拔，反而越来越穷。

csbs.text: 有人慷慨好施，反增添更多； 有人该给不给，却导致缺乏。
